step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the consensus provided by Agents 1 through 3. One additional point is worth noting—the absence of any significant clonal populations derived from naive or centroblastic B-cells supports the exclusive derivation from mature B cells. This exclusion helps solidify our understanding that only terminally differentiated, highly specialized mature B cells serve as progenitors for CLL/SLL tumors due to both phenotypic characteristics and genetic profiles matching those of mature rather than developing B cells.

Answer Choice: A.
